Package org.eventb.internal.ui.proofSkeletonView

Class SequentDetailsPage

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.ui.proofSkeletonView.SequentDetailsPage
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.eclipse.ui.forms.IDetailsPage, org.eclipse.ui.forms.IFormPart, org.eclipse.ui.forms.IPartSelectionListener
public class SequentDetailsPage extends Object implements org.eclipse.ui.forms.IDetailsPage
DetailsPage for sequents. It is used within the proof skeleton MasterDetailsBlock as the page to display for all proof tree nodes.
